label: 🤖 Sensor Simulation
info: Main simulation loop - runs every 1.5s. All robot state stored in global context.

label: ⚙️ Template Automations
info: 5 pre-built automation templates (Heat Guard, Low Battery, Vib Shield, Predictive Maint, Smart Nav). Use inject nodes to activate/deactivate each.

label: 🚀 Motion Control
info: All robot movement commands: start/stop/e-stop, directional control, dock, patrol, waypoint, path planning.

label: 🔧 Flow Engine (Demo)
info: Visual flow programming equivalent. Four demo chains showing all node types.

label: 🚨 Alerts & Logging
info: Consolidated alerts routed by severity. Full event log.

name: NeuroFlow HMI — Node-RED Conversion | Tick: 1.5 s | State: global context
info:
All robot and sensor state lives in Node-RED global context.
Access anywhere with global.get('key') / global.set('key', value).

Key globals:
  robot     : {x,y,angle,speed,battery,payload,docked,state}
  sensors   : {vib, temp}
  activeTemplates : string[]
  speedLimit, riskScore, predAlert
  vibHistory, tempHistory (rolling 120-point arrays)
  isPatrolling, isDocking, isFollowingPath
  activePath, activePathIndex, patrolIndex
  currentZone, lastZone, vibTrend

name: Initialize Global State
Main Simulation Tick — 1.5 s
info: Simulates sensor drift, battery drain, robot position drift, docking/charging, patrol and path-following movement. Emits sensor_update on output 1 and motion_event / zone_change on output 2.

name: Simulate Sensors & Robot State
Apply Active Templates
Generate Alert List
Fault Injection — manually spike sensors for testing
info: Use the inject below to artificially drive vibration to 88% to test template and alert firing.

name: Apply Fault Override
Template Automations — activate/deactivate with inject nodes below
info:
Each template monitors the live sensor snapshot forwarded from Tab 1.

Templates:
  heat   — Prevent Overheating: speed → 60% when temp > 55°C
  batt   — Low Battery Return: auto-dock when battery < 20%
  vib    — Avoid High Vibration: speed → 50% when vib > 70%
  maint  — Predictive Maintenance: advisory log when failure predicted
  nav    — Smart Navigation: stochastic obstacle rerouting

name: Toggle Template State
Evaluate Templates Against Sensor Data
Motion Control — inject a command to change robot state
info:
All commands write to global context 'robot' and motion flags.
The simulation tick in Tab 1 reads these flags each cycle to determine movement.

name: Handle State Command
Set Speed Limit
Handle Navigation Command
─── Path Planning ───
info: Send a waypoints array [{x,y},…] as the payload to start multi-point path following.

name: Execute Path Plan
Flow Engine — Equivalent of the drag-drop visual flow builder
info:
Four independent demo chains, each mapping to a section of the original Flow Engine.

Chain A: Vibration Sensor → Condition → Reduce Speed + Alert
Chain B: Move To → Pick Payload → Path Planning → Drop Payload
Chain C: Dock → Loop (2×) → Wait 3s
Chain D: Zone Detector → Emergency Stop → Auto-Reset

name: Chain A — Vibration Sensor → Condition (IF vib > 40) → Reduce Speed + Alert
📡 Vibration Sensor
🐢 Reduce Speed
🚨 Send Alert
✅ No Action (normal)
Chain B — Move To → Pick Payload → Path Planning → Drop Payload
🚀 Move To (220,50)
📦 Pick Payload
🗺️ Path Planning
📤 Drop Payload
Chain C — Dock → Loop (2 iterations × Wait 3s)
🔌 Dock Command
🔁 Loop Controller
Chain D — Zone Detector (Zone D) → Emergency Stop → Auto-Reset 5s
⬤ Zone Detector (watching D)
🛑 Emergency Stop
✅ Zone OK
▶ Auto Resume
Alerts & Logging — routes incoming alerts by severity, outputs to debug console and event log
info:
Receives alerts from Tab 1 via link-in.
Routes by level: danger → error debug, warn → warning debug, info/ok → info debug.
All events pass through the event log formatter.

name: Format Status Line
Enrich & Split Alerts
Event Log — structured log of all motion and alert events
Format Event Log Entry
